metadata.short_desc: Knowledge-base backed long-term memory, recall, and management tools.
metadata.desc: Adds long-term memory to AstrBot using the built-in knowledge base for user preferences, past interactions, and important facts.

kb_name.hint: Select the knowledge base used to store long-term memories. Required. Create one first in Knowledge Base Management and configure an embedding model.

extraction_provider_id.hint: LLM used to extract memories from conversations. Leave empty to use the current chat model.

summarization_provider_id.hint: LLM used for future memory merging and compression. Leave empty to use the current chat model.

auto_memorize.hint: When enabled, memories are automatically extracted and stored after conversations.

extraction_interval.hint: Run memory extraction every N conversation turns and summarize those turns.

extraction_min_content_length.hint: Skip memory extraction when the accumulated conversation is shorter than this many characters.

global_memory.hint: When enabled, personal memories can be recalled across sessions for the same user. When disabled, only personal memories from the current session are recalled.

max_memories_per_inject.hint: Maximum number of memories injected into each LLM request.

max_memory_list_scan.hint: Limits how many records /memory list scans to calculate memories visible to the current user. The actual scan amount is derived from the page and page size and will not exceed this limit.

memory_delete_scan_page_size.hint: Number of matched records scanned per page before deleting or clearing memories. Larger values are faster but use more memory per operation.

memory_ttl_days.hint: Low-frequency memories older than this many days may be compressed into impressions.

use_reranker.hint: Use the knowledge base reranker to improve memory recall ordering. Requires a reranker model configured on the knowledge base.

optimize_recall_query.hint: Before each memory recall, call the extraction model to extract search keywords for better recall accuracy. This runs on every conversation, so use a fast lightweight model.

optimize_recall_query_timeout.hint: Maximum wait time for recall query optimization. On timeout, the original query is used so conversation responses are not blocked.

enable_admin_global_memory_tool.hint: When enabled, provides the memory_store_global tool so administrators can ask AI to add global memories that apply to all chats.

recall_sparse_fusion.hint: Adds FTS5 keyword sparse retrieval atop dense vector search and fuses both via RRF, improving recall for keywords/proper nouns. Falls back to dense-only when FTS5 is unavailable.

recall_weight_importance.hint: Weight of importance in recall re-ranking (0-1)

recall_weight_frequency.hint: Weight of recall_count frequency in recall re-ranking (0-1)

recall_weight_recency.hint: Weight of time decay in recall re-ranking (0-1)

recall_recency_halflife_days.hint: Recency decay halflife: a memory N days old scores about 0.5

memory_consolidation_enabled.hint: Periodically compress low-frequency old memories into summary impressions via LLM; originals are marked deprecated. Requires a summarization model.

consolidation_min_age_days.hint: Only consolidate memories older than this many days

consolidation_max_recall.hint: Only consolidate low-frequency memories with recall count at or below this (avoids compressing frequently-used memories)

consolidation_batch_size.hint: Maximum number of memories processed per consolidation run
